name: Atlas Copco AB
h1: Atlas Copco's GCC footprint in India
lede: Atlas Copco runs four centers across three Indian cities. Hyderabad, Pune and Bengaluru, covering R&D and engineering & design, built over 24 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Atlas Copco office in India. We map four, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Atlas Copco AB GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Atlas Copco runs 4 verified centers across 3 Indian cities (Hyderabad, Pune, Bengaluru), covering R&D and engineering & design. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Atlas Copco's India footprint covers Hyderabad, Pune and Bengaluru, spanning R&D and engineering & design. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all twenty decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.a: Atlas Copco operates 4 active centers in India.
